news.t: Inverse Index ETFs Form Potential Double Bottom

holdings.infoBox: DXD is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares UltraShort Dow30 (DXD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dow Jones Industrial Average index. The fund provides 2x inverse exposure to the price-weighted Dow Jones Industrial Average, which includes 30 of the largest US companies. DXD was launched on Jul 11, 2006 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Inverse Index ETFs Form Potential Double Bottom
data.text: Disappointing manufacturing data sparked trade war fallout fears Tuesday. Short the major indexes by going long these three inverse ETFs.
